── PASS COMPLETE · v98.7 · 2026-05-27 ──────────────────────

Title: PICKING_MODE bailout cuts hover cost
Summary: Early-returning from the plasma fragment shader during the picking pass drops hover-frame cost across every tested GPU.
Project: lumaweave

Highlights:
· Picking pass early-returns from the plasma shader when PICKING_MODE is set
· Hover-frame readback cost down ~1.3x on RTX-class GPUs, ~2x on older Intel
· Hover state cached so identical-target moves skip the readback entirely

Learnings:
· readPixels cost is dominated by the queued GPU work it waits on, not the read
· The bailout's speedup scales inversely with pipeline efficiency

Commit: c1f0a9d
Tests: 41 passed · 0 failed · 0 skipped
Branch: clean
